tEn: Hunyuan-TurboS: Advancing Large Language Models through Mamba-Transformer Synergy and Adaptive Chain-of-Thought
tZh: Hunyuan-TurboS：通过Mamba-Transformer协同与自适应思维链推进大语言模型
sEn: Hunyuan-TurboS is a novel hybrid Transformer-Mamba MoE model with adaptive long-short chain-of-thought, achieving top-7 on LMSYS Chatbot Arena with 1356 points.
sZh: Hunyuan-TurboS是一种新型混合Transformer-Mamba MoE模型，具备自适应长-短思维链机制，在LMSYS Chatbot Arena上以1356分排名前七。
absEn: As Large Language Models (LLMs) rapidly advance, we introduce Hunyuan-TurboS, a novel large hybrid Transformer-Mamba Mixture of Experts (MoE) model. It synergistically combines Mamba's long-sequence processing efficiency with Transformer's superior contextual understanding. Hunyuan-TurboS features an adaptive long-short chain-of-thought (CoT) mechanism, dynamically switching between rapid responses for simple queries and deep "thinking" modes for complex problems, optimizing computational resources. Architecturally, this 56B activated (560B total) parameter model employs 128 layers (Mamba2, Attention, FFN) with an innovative AMF/MF block pattern. Faster Mamba2 ensures linear complexity, Grouped-Query Attention minimizes KV cache, and FFNs use an MoE structure. Pre-trained on 16T high-quality tokens, it supports a 256K context length and is the first industry-deployed large-scale Mamba model. Our comprehensive post-training strategy enhances capabilities via Supervised Fine-Tuning (3M instructions), a novel Adaptive Long-short CoT Fusion method, Multi-round Deliberation Learning for iterative improvement, and a two-stage Large-scale Reinforcement Learning process targeting STEM and general instruction-following. Evaluations show strong performance: overall top 7 rank on LMSYS Chatbot Arena with a score of 1356, outperforming leading models like Gemini-2.0-Flash-001 (1352) and o4-mini-2025-04-16 (1345). TurboS also achieves an average of 77.9% across 23 automated benchmarks. Hunyuan-TurboS balances high performance and efficiency, offering substantial capabilities at lower inference costs than many reasoning models, establishing a new paradigm for efficient large-scale pre-trained models.
absZh: 随着大语言模型（LLM）的快速发展，我们推出了Hunyuan-TurboS，一种新颖的大型混合Transformer-Mamba混合专家（MoE）模型。它协同结合了Mamba在长序列处理上的高效性与Transformer在上下文理解上的卓越能力。Hunyuan-TurboS具备自适应长-短思维链（CoT）机制，可针对简单查询动态切换快速响应模式，针对复杂问题切换深度“思考”模式，从而优化计算资源。在架构上，这个拥有560B总参数（56B激活参数）的模型采用了128层（Mamba2、Attention、FFN）结构，并创新性地使用了AMF/MF块模式。更快的Mamba2保证了线性复杂度，分组查询注意力（GQA）最小化了KV缓存，而FFN则采用了MoE结构。该模型在16T高质量token上进行了预训练，支持256K上下文长度，是业界首个大规模部署的Mamba模型。我们全面的后训练策略通过监督微调（300万条指令）、新颖的自适应长-短CoT融合方法、用于迭代改进的多轮审议学习，以及针对STEM和通用指令遵循的两阶段大规模强化学习过程，增强了模型能力。评估结果显示其性能强劲：在LMSYS Chatbot Arena上总体排名第七，得分1356，优于Gemini-2.0-Flash-001（1352）和o4-mini-2025-04-16（1345）等领先模型。TurboS在23个自动化基准测试中平均得分77.9%。Hunyuan-TurboS在高效能与低推理成本之间取得了平衡，以低于许多推理模型的成本提供了强大的能力，为高效大规模预训练模型树立了新范式。

contrib.en: Proposes Hunyuan-TurboS, the first industry-deployed large-scale hybrid Transformer-Mamba MoE model with 56B activated parameters.
contrib.zh: 提出Hunyuan-TurboS，首个工业部署的大规模混合Transformer-Mamba MoE模型，激活参数560亿。

contrib.en: Introduces adaptive long-short chain-of-thought fusion, dynamically switching reasoning depth to optimize compute.
contrib.zh: 引入自适应长短思维链融合，动态切换推理深度以优化算力。

contrib.en: Designs novel AMF/MF block pattern combining Mamba2, Grouped-Query Attention, and MoE for efficiency.
contrib.zh: 设计新颖的AMF/MF块模式，结合Mamba2、分组查询注意力和MoE以提高效率。

contrib.en: Develops multi-round deliberation learning with LLM judge ensemble and human oversight for iterative improvement.
contrib.zh: 开发多轮审议学习，结合LLM评审团和人工监督进行迭代改进。

contrib.en: Implements two-stage large-scale reinforcement learning (GRPO) targeting STEM reasoning and general instruction-following.
contrib.zh: 实施两阶段大规模强化学习（GRPO），针对STEM推理和通用指令遵循。

contrib.en: Achieves top 7 LMSYS Chatbot Arena score (1356) and 77.9% average on 23 benchmarks with lower inference cost.
contrib.zh: 在LMSYS Chatbot Arena取得第7名（1356分），23项基准平均77.9%，推理成本更低。

limits.en: Evaluation limited to 23 automated benchmarks; real-world deployment scenarios may reveal additional limitations.
limits.zh: 评估限于23项自动化基准；实际部署场景可能揭示额外局限。

limits.en: Adaptive CoT mechanism may not generalize well to domains with ambiguous difficulty or novel reasoning patterns.
limits.zh: 自适应思维链机制可能难以泛化到难度模糊或新颖推理模式的领域。

limits.en: Dependence on high-quality pre-training data (16T tokens) may limit reproducibility for resource-constrained teams.
limits.zh: 依赖高质量预训练数据（16T词元）可能限制资源受限团队的可复现性。

limits.en: Hybrid Mamba-Transformer architecture introduces engineering complexity for inference optimization and deployment.
limits.zh: 混合Mamba-Transformer架构增加了推理优化和部署的工程复杂性。

limits.en: Two-stage RL requires extensive reward engineering and domain-specific data, potentially limiting scalability.
limits.zh: 两阶段RL需要大量奖励工程和领域特定数据，可能限制可扩展性。

items.zh: 随着大型语言模型（LLM）的快速发展，我们推出了Hunyuan-TurboS，一种新颖的大型混合Transformer-Mamba混合专家（MoE）模型。它协同结合了Mamba的长序列处理效率与Transformer的卓越上下文理解能力。Hunyuan-TurboS采用自适应长短思维链（CoT）机制，可动态切换：对于简单查询快速响应，对于复杂问题则进入深度“思考”模式，从而优化算力资源。在架构上，这个560B总参数（56B激活参数）的模型采用128层（Mamba2、注意力机制、FFN），并采用创新的AMF/MF块模式。更快的Mamba2确保线性复杂度，分组查询注意力最小化KV缓存，FFN使用MoE结构。该模型在16T高质量token上预训练，支持256K上下文长度，是首个工业部署的大规模Mamba模型。我们的综合后训练策略通过监督微调（3M指令）、新颖的自适应长短CoT融合方法、用于迭代改进的多轮审议学习，以及针对STEM和通用指令遵循的两阶段大规模强化学习过程，增强了模型能力。评估显示其性能强劲：在LMSYS Chatbot Arena中总体排名前7，得分1356，优于Gemini-2.0-Flash-001（1352）和o4-mini-2025-04-16（1345）等领先模型。TurboS在23个自动化基准测试中平均得分77.9%。Hunyuan-TurboS平衡了高性能与效率，以低于许多推理模型的推理成本提供强大能力，为高效大规模预训练模型建立了新范式。

items.en: Large Language Models (LLMs) have witnessed unprecedented acceleration in their development, rapidly advancing towards artificial general intelligence (AGI) through recent breakthroughs in foundation models. Advanced systems such as GPT-4o (OpenAI, 2024a), Gemini 2.5 (DeepMind, 2025), DeepSeek-R1 (Guo et al., 2025), and Qwen3 (Yang et al., 2025b) now demonstrate capabilities that significantly narrow the gap between specialized AI and the generalized intelligence humans have long sought to create. Aiming to further push these boundaries, we introduce Hunyuan-TurboS, a large hybrid Transformer-Mamba Mixture of Experts (MoE) model.
items.zh: 大型语言模型（LLM）的发展速度前所未有，通过基础模型的最新突破，正迅速向通用人工智能（AGI）迈进。GPT-4o（OpenAI, 2024a）、Gemini 2.5（DeepMind, 2025）、DeepSeek-R1（Guo et al., 2025）和Qwen3（Yang et al., 2025b）等先进系统展现出的能力，显著缩小了专用AI与人类长期追求的通用智能之间的差距。为了进一步突破这些边界，我们推出了Hunyuan-TurboS，一种大型混合Transformer-Mamba混合专家（MoE）模型。

items.en: Hunyuan-TurboS exhibits several innovative characteristics that establish it as a powerful LLM achieving an excellent balance between performance and efficiency. First, it synergistically combines the efficient long-sequence processing capabilities of the Mamba (Gu & Dao, 2023) architecture with the superior contextual understanding of the Transformer (Vaswani et al., 2017) architecture. Second, it employs an adaptive long-short chain-of-thought mechanism. This integrates the advantages of short chain-of-thought models (e.g., GPT-4o (OpenAI, 2024a)), such as rapid response and computation-friendly inference, with the excellent complex reasoning capabilities of long chain-of-thought models (e.g., o3 (OpenAI, 2025)). When faced with simple questions, TurboS automatically activates a "no thinking" mode to deliver results of sufficient quality at minimal computational cost. Conversely, when encountering complex problems, TurboS automatically switches to a "thinking" mode, employing deep reasoning methods such as step-by-step analysis, self-reflection, and backtracking to arrive at highly accurate answers.
items.zh: Hunyuan-TurboS展现出多项创新特性，使其成为一款在性能与效率之间取得出色平衡的强大LLM。首先，它协同结合了Mamba（Gu & Dao, 2023）架构的高效长序列处理能力与Transformer（Vaswani et al., 2017）架构的卓越上下文理解能力。其次，它采用自适应长短思维链机制，融合了短思维链模型（如GPT-4o（OpenAI, 2024a））的快速响应和计算友好推理优势，以及长思维链模型（如o3（OpenAI, 2025））的出色复杂推理能力。面对简单问题时，TurboS自动激活“无思考”模式，以最小计算成本提供足够质量的结果；反之，遇到复杂问题时，自动切换至“思考”模式，采用逐步分析、自我反思和回溯等深度推理方法，得出高精度答案。

items.en: Hunyuan-TurboS is a hybrid architecture that integrates Transformer, Mamba2 (Dao & Gu, 2024), and Feed-Forward Network (FFN) components, designed for scalability and efficiency in both training and inference. With 128 layers (57 Mamba, 7 Attention, and 64 FFN), the model scales to 56B activated parameters and 560B total parameters. The architecture employs an "AMF" (Attention → Mamba2 → FFN) and "MF" (Mamba2 → FFN) block pattern to balance performance and efficiency, for long-context tasks. Mamba2 layers achieve linear complexity, while Grouped-Query Attention (GQA) (Ainslie et al., 2023) further minimizes KV cache overhead. The FFN layers use an MoE structure with 32 experts, activating 1 shared and 2 specialized experts per token. Hunyuan-TurboS is pre-trained on a 16T high-quality token dataset, supporting a context length of up to 256K. Notably, Hunyuan-TurboS is the first industry-deployed large-scale Mamba-based model, setting a new paradigm for efficient large-scale pre-trained models.
items.zh: Hunyuan-TurboS是一种混合架构，集成了Transformer、Mamba2（Dao & Gu, 2024）和前馈网络（FFN）组件，旨在实现训练和推理的可扩展性与效率。该模型拥有128层（57个Mamba、7个注意力和64个FFN），规模达到56B激活参数和560B总参数。架构采用“AMF”（注意力→Mamba2→FFN）和“MF”（Mamba2→FFN）块模式，以平衡长上下文任务的性能与效率。Mamba2层实现线性复杂度，而分组查询注意力（GQA）（Ainslie et al., 2023）进一步最小化KV缓存开销。FFN层使用包含32个专家的MoE结构，每个token激活1个共享专家和2个专用专家。Hunyuan-TurboS在16T高质量token数据集上预训练，支持高达256K的上下文长度。值得注意的是，Hunyuan-TurboS是首个工业部署的大规模基于Mamba的模型，为高效大规模预训练模型树立了新范式。

items.en: Our post-training strategy for Hunyuan-TurboS encompasses four critical modules designed to significantly enhance its capabilities. Initially, Supervised Fine-Tuning establishes a robust foundation by methodically curating 3M natural and synthetic (Wang et al., 2022; Luo et al., 2023b; Zeng et al., 2024; Luo et al., 2023a; Wei et al., 2023b) instruction data, categorized by comprehensively delineated topics across diverse domains and implementing multi-dimensional metrics for rigorous filtering and quality assurance. We then introduce a novel Adaptive Long-short Chain-of-Thought Fusion method, enabling the model to autonomously select optimal reasoning strategies, efficiently allocate computational resources, and enhance response readability through lossless compression and reformatting of lengthy chains of thoughts, achieved via a teacher model refined through dedicated SFT and a unique reinforcement learning framework with difficulty-adaptive and CoT compression rewards. Subsequently, Multi-round Deliberation Learning involves the SFT model comparing other cutting-edge Hunyuan models in a simulated evaluation environment, an iterative refinement cycle driven by evaluations from a multi-LLM judge ensemble and human expert oversight to strategically identify and address capability gaps, informing subsequent SFT iterations. Finally, a Two-stage Large-scale Reinforcement Learning process, leveraging GRPO, further hones the model. The first stage focuses on bolstering reasoning capabilities, while the second stage aims to improve general instruction-following proficiency across all domains. This synergistic, multi-faceted strategy aims to cultivate a highly capable, efficient, and adaptable language model.
items.zh: Hunyuan-TurboS的后训练策略包含四个关键模块，旨在显著增强其能力。首先，监督微调通过系统整理300万条自然和合成（Wang et al., 2022; Luo et al., 2023b; Zeng et al., 2024; Luo et al., 2023a; Wei et al., 2023b）指令数据建立坚实基础，这些数据按跨不同领域的全面主题分类，并采用多维指标进行严格过滤和质量保证。然后，我们引入了一种新颖的自适应长短思维链融合方法，使模型能够自主选择最优推理策略，高效分配算力资源，并通过无损压缩和重新格式化长思维链来增强响应可读性，这是通过专用SFT精炼的教师模型和独特的强化学习框架（包含难度自适应和CoT压缩奖励）实现的。随后，多轮审议学习涉及SFT模型在模拟评估环境中与其他前沿Hunyuan模型进行比较，这是一个由多LLM评判集成和人类专家监督驱动的迭代改进循环，旨在战略性地识别和解决能力差距，为后续SFT迭代提供信息。最后，利用GRPO的两阶段大规模强化学习过程进一步打磨模型。第一阶段侧重于增强推理能力，第二阶段旨在提高所有领域的通用指令遵循能力。这种协同、多方面的策略旨在培养一个高度能干、高效且适应性强的语言模型。

items.en: Both human and automated evaluations demonstrate the competitive capabilities of Hunyuan-TurboS. In the LMSys Chatbot Arena, known for its blind, side-by-side human evaluations that minimize bias and offer objective capability assessment, Hunyuan-TurboS achieved a notable score of 1356. This places it among the top 7 models, outperforming strong contenders like Gemini-2.0-Flash-001, o4-mini and Gemma-3-27B-it. Notably, in categories such as Math, Multi-Turn, and Longer Query, our model ranks among the top 5. For comprehensive automated assessment, we evaluated Hunyuan-TurboS across 23 benchmarks encompassing mathematical reasoning, logical reasoning, code generation, knowledge, alignment tasks, and instruction following. The model achieved an average score of 77.9%, significantly outperforming comparable non-reasoning models. While its performance approaches that of computationally intensive reasoning models, Hunyuan-TurboS demonstrates a remarkable balance of efficiency and effectiveness, particularly considering its substantially lower inference costs.
items.zh: 人工和自动化评估均证明了Hunyuan-TurboS的竞争能力。在LMSYS Chatbot Arena中，该平台以盲测、并排人工评估著称，能最小化偏差并提供客观能力评估，Hunyuan-TurboS取得了1356分的显著成绩，位列前7名，优于Gemini-2.0-Flash-001、o4-mini和Gemma-3-27B-it等强劲对手。值得注意的是，在数学、多轮和长查询等类别中，我们的模型排名前5。在全面自动化评估方面，我们在涵盖数学推理、逻辑推理、代码生成、知识、对齐任务和指令遵循的23个基准测试上评估了Hunyuan-TurboS。模型平均得分77.9%，显著优于同类非推理模型。虽然其性能接近计算密集型推理模型，但Hunyuan-TurboS在效率与效果之间展现了卓越平衡，尤其考虑到其显著较低的推理成本。

items.en: Data Recipe: We developed a meticulous data curation pipeline for 16T high-quality tokens, improving quantity, quality, and diversity through systematic filtering, deduplication, and specialized content extraction modules.
items.zh: 数据配方：我们为16T高质量token开发了精细的数据整理流程，通过系统过滤、去重和专门内容提取模块，提高了数量、质量和多样性。

items.en: 560B Mamba: We designed a novel 560B total parameter hybrid Transformer-Mamba2-MoE architecture, featuring innovative AMF/MF block patterns. This synergizes Mamba2's efficiency with Transformer's contextual understanding.
items.zh: 560B Mamba：我们设计了一种新颖的560B总参数混合Transformer-Mamba2-MoE架构，采用创新的AMF/MF块模式，协同了Mamba2的效率与Transformer的上下文理解能力。

items.en: Annealing: We implemented multi-stage pre-training refinements including an annealing phase with diverse data and curriculum-based long-context extension up to 256K tokens using NTK-aware positional encoding.
items.zh: 退火：我们实施了多阶段预训练优化，包括使用多样化数据的退火阶段和基于课程的长上下文扩展（使用NTK感知位置编码，最高256K token）。

items.en: Data Recipe: We curated a 3M instruction dataset for robust Supervised Fine-Tuning, categorized by diverse topics with rigorous quality assurance, establishing strong foundational capabilities for the model.
items.zh: 数据配方：我们整理了300万条指令数据集用于稳健的监督微调，按多样化主题分类并经过严格质量保证，为模型建立了强大的基础能力。

items.en: Adaptive CoT Fusion: We developed an Adaptive Long-short Chain-of-Thought Fusion method, enabling dynamic selection of reasoning strategies via a specially trained teacher model and reinforcement learning. Notably, our model delivers performance comparable to that of top-tier reasoning model in the LMSYS Chatbot Arena while utilizing only about 50% of the generation tokens, highlighting significant improvements in token efficiency which directly translate to reduced generation costs.
items.zh: 自适应CoT融合：我们开发了自适应长短思维链融合方法，通过专门训练的教师模型和强化学习实现推理策略的动态选择。值得注意的是，我们的模型在LMSYS Chatbot Arena中达到了与顶级推理模型相当的性能，同时仅使用约50%的生成token，这显著提升了token效率，直接降低了生成成本。

items.en: Deliberation Learning: We implemented Multi-round Deliberation Learning, where the SFT model iteratively refines its capabilities by competing against other models, guided by an LLM-judge ensemble and Human expert oversight.
items.zh: 审议学习：我们实施了多轮审议学习，其中SFT模型通过与其他模型竞争，在LLM评判集成和人类专家监督指导下迭代优化其能力。

items.en: Two-stage GRPO: We employed a two-stage Large-scale Reinforcement Learning (GRPO) process, first targeting STEM reasoning and then general instruction-following, guided by a comprehensive general reward system.
items.zh: 两阶段GRPO：我们采用了两阶段大规模强化学习（GRPO）过程，首先针对STEM推理，然后针对通用指令遵循，由全面的通用奖励系统引导。

items.en: Angel-RL: We built Angel-RL, an efficient reinforcement learning framework integrating training and inference, incorporating comprehensive parallelism (TP, PP, EP, CP) and innovative state-passing for context parallelism.
items.zh: Angel-RL：我们构建了Angel-RL，一个集成训练和推理的高效强化学习框架，包含全面的并行化（TP、PP、EP、CP）和用于上下文并行的创新状态传递。

items.en: Mamba MoE: We optimized inference via AngelHCF, featuring Mamba kernel enhancements (prefill/decode), MoE expert parallelism, and fp32 precision for Mamba states to improve long-text generation quality. It ultimately achieving a 1.8x speedup compared to Hunyuan-Turbo, which is a pure Transformers MoE model.
items.zh: Mamba MoE：我们通过AngelHCF优化推理，包括Mamba内核增强（预填充/解码）、MoE专家并行以及Mamba状态的fp32精度，以改善长文本生成质量。最终相比纯Transformer MoE模型Hunyuan-Turbo实现了1.8倍加速。

items.en: LMSYS Chatbot Arena: Hunyuan-TurboS achieved a 1356 Arena score, ranking top 7 overall. It excelled with top 1 in Chinese, French, and Spanish, and top 5 in tasks like Hard Prompts, Creative Writing, Multi-Turn, and Longer Queries.
items.zh: LMSYS Chatbot Arena：Hunyuan-TurboS获得1356的Arena分数，总体排名前7。在中文、法语和西班牙语中排名第一，在硬提示、创意写作、多轮和长查询等任务中排名前5。

items.en: Automatic Evaluations: The model demonstrated strong performance across 23 automated benchmarks, achieving an average of 77.9%, with notable results in mathematics, coding and general domains.
items.zh: 自动评估：该模型在23个自动化基准测试中表现强劲，平均得分77.9%，在数学、编程和通用领域取得显著成果。

items.en: Balance efficiency and performance: Our model effectively balances high performance and computational efficiency, delivering substantial capabilities comparable to larger reasoning models but at significantly lower inference costs across diverse evaluations.
items.zh: 平衡效率与性能：我们的模型有效平衡了高性能与计算效率，在不同评估中提供了与更大推理模型相当的能力，但推理成本显著降低。

items.en: In this section, we will introduce the details of our pre-training stage in Hunyuan-TurboS, including (a) data for pre-training, which provides a systematic pipeline for data quality control and data mix, providing fundamental information for the capability acquisition of LLMs, (b) model structure, which proposes a novel hybrid Transformer-Mamba structure for effective and efficient LLM training and serving, with comprehensive design motivations and details, and (c) annealing and long-context pre-training recipes, with several insights during these two essential stages in pre-training. These techniques build the foundation of our Hunyuan-TurboS's remarkable capability to facilitate downstream applications.
items.zh: 本节将介绍Hunyuan-TurboS预训练阶段的细节，包括：(a) 预训练数据，提供系统化的数据质量控制和数据混合流程，为LLM能力获取提供基础信息；(b) 模型结构，提出新颖的混合Transformer-Mamba结构，用于高效有效的LLM训练和服务，包含全面的设计动机和细节；(c) 退火和长上下文预训练配方，以及这两个预训练关键阶段中的若干见解。这些技术为Hunyuan-TurboS的卓越能力奠定了基础，以促进下游应用。

items.en: Pre-training data are the fundamental fuel of LLMs. Compared to Hunyuan-Large (Sun et al., 2024), we enhance the data used for the pre-training stage in three key dimensions: quantity, quality, and diversity.
items.zh: 预训练数据是大语言模型的基本燃料。与 Hunyuan-Large (Sun et al., 2024) 相比，我们从数量、质量和多样性三个关键维度增强了预训练阶段使用的数据。

items.capEn: Figure 2: The curation pipeline of pre-training data in Hunyuan-TurboS.
items.capZh: 图 2：Hunyuan-TurboS 预训练数据的整理流程。

items.en: We rigorously refine our curation pipeline to efficiently process diverse raw data sources, as illustrated in Figure 2. The process begins with URL-level deduplication and filtering of the varied-format source data to eliminate redundant items. Additionally, we utilize precise block-level pruning techniques to remove noisy content within each instance, further reducing the volume of low-quality data and accelerating downstream processes. Each piece of raw content is then annotated with a specific topic label by our topic classification model, which facilitates subsequent processing stages. Following this, a content extraction model processes the previously cleaned data to extract plain text. To ensure the acquisition of high-quality STEM and code data, we construct several domain-specific extraction modules. Additionally, we employ comprehensive heuristic filtering methods to discard low-qualified extracted content, and implement global-scale semantic-level deduplication to produce the final data.
items.zh: 我们严格优化了数据整理流程，以高效处理多样化的原始数据源，如图 2 所示。该流程首先对多种格式的源数据进行 URL 级别的去重和过滤，以消除冗余项。此外，我们利用精确的块级剪枝技术去除每个实例中的噪声内容，进一步减少低质量数据的数量并加速下游处理。然后，我们的主题分类模型为每段原始内容标注特定的主题标签，以促进后续处理阶段。随后，内容提取模型处理之前清洗过的数据以提取纯文本。为了确保获取高质量的 STEM 和代码数据，我们构建了多个领域特定的提取模块。此外，我们采用全面的启发式过滤方法丢弃低质量的提取内容，并实施全局规模的语义级去重以生成最终数据。

items.en: Furthermore, we optimize our quality and diversity assurance systems by developing comprehensive critique models and data mixture models. We introduce several foundational quality criteria with dozens of well-organized domain type labels into our critique models, enabling principled data selection and integration. Across different phases of pre-training, we employ effective mixture models to provide varied data mixture recipes that ensure optimal data utilization.
items.zh: 此外，我们通过开发全面的评判模型和数据混合模型来优化质量和多样性保障系统。我们在评判模型中引入了几个基础质量标准以及数十个组织良好的领域类型标签，从而实现原则性的数据选择和集成。在预训练的不同阶段，我们采用有效的混合模型提供不同的数据混合配方，以确保最佳的数据利用。

items.en: Overall, Hunyuan-TurboS is trained on a corpus comprising 1616 trillion tokens in our tokenizer, which is the same as the tokenizer used in Hunyuan-Large employing a vocabulary consisting of 128K tokens.
items.zh: 总体而言，Hunyuan-TurboS 在我们的分词器上使用包含 1616 万亿个 token 的语料库进行训练，该分词器与 Hunyuan-Large 使用的分词器相同，词汇表包含 128K 个 token。

items.en: Hunyuan-TurboS is a hybrid architecture that combines Transformer (Vaswani et al., 2017), Mamba2 (Dao & Gu, 2024), and Feed-Forward Network (FFN) components. Designed in compliance with scaling laws and optimized for both training and inference efficiency, the model was scaled to 56B activated parameters and 560B total parameters. The architecture comprises 128 layers (where each Attention, FFN, and Mamba2 block counts as one layer). Each FFN layer adopts an MoE structure following similar strategies used in Hunyuan-Large (Sun et al., 2024), consisting of 1 shared expert and 32 specialized experts, with 1 shared + 2 specialized experts activated per forward pass. The Mamba2 layers employ a state-space model (SSM) architecture achieving linear sequence-length complexity (O(n)). We extensively explored various combinations of Attention (A), Mamba2 (M), and FFN (F) layers to optimize model performance while maintaining efficiency under fixed activated and total parameter budgets. The ratio of Attention layers significantly impacts model performance, validation loss, key-value (KV) cache overhead, and inference efficiency. To maximize training efficiency and model effectiveness, we maintained FFN layers at 50% percent of the total, with 5.5% Attention and 44.5% Mamba2 layers. The Attention layers utilize Grouped-Query Attention (GQA) to minimize KV cache memory usage. Additionally, QK normalization was implemented in the Attention blocks to enhance the training stability.
items.zh: Hunyuan-TurboS 是一种混合架构，结合了 Transformer (Vaswani et al., 2017)、Mamba2 (Dao & Gu, 2024) 和前馈网络 (FFN) 组件。该模型按照缩放定律设计，并针对训练和推理效率进行了优化，扩展到 56B 激活参数和 560B 总参数。架构包含 128 层（每个 Attention、FFN 和 Mamba2 块计为一层）。每个 FFN 层采用 MoE 结构，遵循 Hunyuan-Large (Sun et al., 2024) 中使用的类似策略，由 1 个共享专家和 32 个专门专家组成，每次前向传播激活 1 个共享专家和 2 个专门专家。Mamba2 层采用状态空间模型 (SSM) 架构，实现线性序列长度复杂度 (O(n))。我们广泛探索了 Attention (A)、Mamba2 (M) 和 FFN (F) 层的各种组合，以在固定的激活和总参数预算下优化模型性能，同时保持效率。Attention 层的比例显著影响模型性能、验证损失、键值 (KV) 缓存开销和推理效率。为了最大化训练效率和模型有效性，我们将 FFN 层保持在总数的 50%，其中 5.5% 为 Attention 层，44.5% 为 Mamba2 层。Attention 层使用分组查询注意力 (GQA) 以最小化 KV 缓存内存使用。此外，在 Attention 块中实现了 QK 归一化以增强训练稳定性。

items.en: For the specific architecture, We define the ``AMF'' block (Attention→\rightarrowMamba2→\rightarrowFFN) emerged as an optimal atomic configuration, effectively balancing efficiency. We also adopt the ``MF'' block in our structure for further efficiency. Hunyuan-TurboS employs an interleaved architecture of ``AMF'' and ``MF'' blocks.
items.zh: 对于具体架构，我们定义“AMF”块（Attention→Mamba2→FFN）为最优原子配置，有效平衡效率。我们还在结构中采用“MF”块以进一步提高效率。Hunyuan-TurboS 采用“AMF”和“MF”块交错排列的架构。

items.en: Model Hyper-parameters. Hunyuan-TurboS uses a hidden dimension of 5,120, while each expert's intermediate dimension is set to 17,024. In the Attention layers, we configure 64 Attention heads with 8 KV heads. For the Mamba2 blocks, we use 64 parallel heads with a SSM group size of 16. The chunk size in Mamba2 layer is 128.
items.zh: 模型超参数。Hunyuan-TurboS 使用隐藏维度 5,120，每个专家的中间维度设置为 17,024。在 Attention 层中，我们配置了 64 个 Attention 头和 8 个 KV 头。对于 Mamba2 块，我们使用 64 个并行头，SSM 组大小为 16。Mamba2 层中的块大小为 128。

items.en: Training Hyper-parameters. Key hyper-parameters of Hunyuan-TurboS are listed in Table 1. We train the base model with a sequence length of 4,0964,\!096 tokens for a total of 1616 trillion tokens. The optimization uses AdamW (β1=0.9\beta_{1}=0.9, β2=0.95\beta_{2}=0.95) with weight decay λ=0.1\lambda=0.1. For Mixture of Experts training, we set the capacity factor γ=1.5\gamma=1.5 to ensure adequate expert coverage.
items.zh: 训练超参数。Hunyuan-TurboS 的关键超参数列于表 1。我们使用序列长度 4,096 个 token 训练基础模型，总计 1616 万亿个 token。优化使用 AdamW（β1=0.9，β2=0.95），权重衰减 λ=0.1。对于专家混合训练，我们设置容量因子 γ=1.5 以确保足够的专家覆盖。

items.en: Following the completion of our pre-training stage, we introduce an annealing stage designed to rapidly decay the learning rate and refine the capabilities of the base model. This stage begins from the terminal learning rate of pre-training and applies a fast cosine decay schedule down to a minimal learning rate of 5e-6. We configure a sequence length of 4,096 tokens and a batch size corresponding to approximately 9 million tokens. We allocate 300B tokens for the annealing stage. This setup facilitates efficient large-context training while maintaining computational tractability. To ensure comprehensive performance and robustness, the annealing stage is trained on a heterogeneous mixture of data, including high-quality pre-training data, code, mathematics, STEM-related corpora, instruction-following datasets (such as long-CoT data), and other synthetically generated samples. We conduct extensive data ablation and composition studies to optimize the data distribution, addressing model deficiencies and enhancing generalization. Several key insights that emerged during this stage are as follows.
items.zh: 在预训练阶段完成后，我们引入一个退火阶段，旨在快速衰减学习率并完善基础模型的能力。该阶段从预训练的最终学习率开始，应用快速余弦衰减计划降至最小学习率 5e-6。我们配置序列长度为 4,096 个 token，批次大小对应约 900 万个 token。我们为退火阶段分配了 300B 个 token。这种设置有助于在保持计算可行性的同时实现高效的大上下文训练。为了确保全面的性能和鲁棒性，退火阶段在异构数据混合上训练，包括高质量预训练数据、代码、数学、STEM 相关语料、指令遵循数据集（如长思维链数据）以及其他合成生成的样本。我们进行了广泛的数据消融和组成研究，以优化数据分布，解决模型缺陷并增强泛化能力。在此阶段出现的几个关键见解如下。

items.en: Retaining high-quality data from pre-training is of critical importance. Through extensive empirical studies, we carefully curated the composition and proportion of this subset, and found that such optimization leads to substantial improvements in both downstream task performance and generalization ability.
items.zh: 保留预训练中的高质量数据至关重要。通过广泛的实证研究，我们精心策划了该子集的组成和比例，并发现这种优化在下游任务性能和泛化能力方面带来了显著提升。

items.en: A substantial portion of instruction-following data is advanced into the annealing stage. This strategy reduces the amount of instruction tuning required during the SFT stage and facilitates greater capacity for improvement in the subsequent RL stage.
items.zh: 大量指令遵循数据被提前引入退火阶段。这种策略减少了 SFT 阶段所需的指令微调量，并促进了后续 RL 阶段更大的改进能力。

items.en: A moderate proportion of web-crawled content is retained, and target loss is selectively applied to QA-style data. This combination helps prevent the base model from drifting into generating test-like questions when it is supposed to continue open-ended text.
items.zh: 保留中等比例的网页抓取内容，并有选择地对 QA 风格数据应用目标损失。这种组合有助于防止基础模型在应该继续开放式文本时漂移到生成测试式问题。

items.en: Sequence truncation is carefully processed, particularly for long-CoT data. To avoid discarding critical answer content, sequences exceeding the context window are deferred to the long-context training phase.
items.zh: 序列截断被仔细处理，特别是对于长思维链数据。为了避免丢弃关键答案内容，超过上下文窗口的序列被推迟到长上下文训练阶段。

items.en: In the final phase of pre-training, we employ a curriculum-based strategy to progressively expand the model's context window. The context is scaled from 4K tokens to 32K tokens, and ultimately to 256K tokens, as in Hunyuan-Large. This staged expansion is facilitated by NTK-aware (Peng & Quesnelle, 2023) positional encoding, incorporating scaling parameters α=50\alpha=50 for the 32K stage and α=1000\alpha=1000 for the 256K stage. Throughout this stage, we maintain a constant learning rate of 5e-6 and a batch size of approximately 9 million tokens, consistent with the annealing stage. To balance capacity preservation with context extension, we adopt a cautious training strategy that leverages slightly increased token volumes, i.e., 30B for 32K and 20B for 256K, with a 3:1 ratio of short-context to long-context data. We also carefully curate a collection of long documents that span diverse domains and genres, which are relatively scarce in natural distributions but play a crucial role in enhancing the performance of downstream tasks.
items.zh: 在预训练的最后阶段，我们采用基于课程的策略逐步扩展模型的上下文窗口。上下文从 4K 个 token 扩展到 32K 个 token，最终扩展到 256K 个 token，与 Hunyuan-Large 相同。这种分阶段扩展通过 NTK-aware (Peng & Quesnelle, 2023) 位置编码实现，其中 32K 阶段使用缩放参数 α=50，256K 阶段使用 α=1000。在整个阶段，我们保持恒定的学习率 5e-6 和约 900 万个 token 的批次大小，与退火阶段一致。为了平衡容量保持与上下文扩展，我们采用谨慎的训练策略，利用略微增加的 token 数量，即 32K 阶段 30B 和 256K 阶段 20B，短上下文与长上下文数据比例为 3:1。我们还精心策划了一系列涵盖不同领域和体裁的长文档集合，这些文档在自然分布中相对稀缺，但在增强下游任务性能方面起着关键作用。

items.en: In this section, we evaluate the performance of Hunyuan-TurboS pre-trained model across a broad range of widely-used benchmarks, demonstrating its strong fundamental capabilities in diverse tasks.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们评估了 Hunyuan-TurboS 预训练模型在广泛使用的基准测试上的性能，展示了其在多样化任务中的强大基础能力。

items.en: Key Benchmarks. We evaluated Hunyuan-TurboS on a comprehensive set of widely-used benchmarks spanning multiple tasks, including commonsense reasoning, reading comprehension, question answering, mathematical problem solution, coding, and aggregated tasks, in both English and Chinese. We conduct extensive evaluations on the following benchmarks:
items.zh: 关键基准测试。我们在涵盖多种任务的全面且广泛使用的基准测试上评估了 Hunyuan-TurboS，包括常识推理、阅读理解、问答、数学问题求解、编码和聚合任务，涵盖英文和中文。我们在以下基准测试上进行了广泛评估：

items.en: Aggregated knowledge: We evaluate knowledge coverage using MMLU (Hendrycks et al., 2021), MMLU-Pro (Wang et al., 2024b), MMLU-Redux (Gema et al., 2024), BBH (Suzgun et al., 2022), CMMLU (Li et al., 2023a), C-Eval (Huang et al., 2024), CCPM (Li et al., 2021), and SuperGPQA (Du et al., 2025).
items.zh: 聚合知识：我们使用 MMLU (Hendrycks et al., 2021)、MMLU-Pro (Wang et al., 2024b)、MMLU-Redux (Gema et al., 2024)、BBH (Suzgun et al., 2022)、CMMLU (Li et al., 2023a)、C-Eval (Huang et al., 2024)、CCPM (Li et al., 2021) 和 SuperGPQA (Du et al., 2025) 评估知识覆盖。

items.en: Commonsense reasoning: For commonsense understanding, we use HellaSwag (Zellers et al., 2019), WinoGrande (Sakaguchi et al., 2021), and PIQA (Bisk et al., 2020).
items.zh: 常识推理：对于常识理解，我们使用 HellaSwag (Zellers et al., 2019)、WinoGrande (Sakaguchi et al., 2021) 和 PIQA (Bisk et al., 2020)。

items.en: Question answering & reading comprehension: We assess fundamental NLP abilities with DROP (Dua et al., 2019) and NaturalQuestions (Kwiatkowski et al., 2019), while ARC-C (Clark et al., 2018) and TriviaQA (Joshi et al., 2017) evaluate science and world knowledge.
items.zh: 问答与阅读理解：我们使用 DROP (Dua et al., 2019) 和 NaturalQuestions (Kwiatkowski et al., 2019) 评估基础 NLP 能力，而 ARC-C (Clark et al., 2018) 和 TriviaQA (Joshi et al., 2017) 评估科学和世界知识。

items.en: Mathematical reasoning: Mathematical proficiency is tested via GSM8k (Cobbe et al., 2021), MATH (Hendrycks et al., 2021), CMATH (Wei et al., 2023a), and MGSM (Shi et al., 2022).
items.zh: 数学推理：通过 GSM8k (Cobbe 等, 2021)、MATH (Hendrycks 等, 2021)、CMATH (Wei 等, 2023a) 和 MGSM (Shi 等, 2022) 测试数学能力。

items.en: Coding: Coding ability is evaluated using EvalPlus (Chen et al., 2021), MultiPL-E (Cassano et al., 2022), MBPP (Austin et al., 2021), CRUXEval (Gu et al., 2024), and LiveCodeBench (Jain et al., 2024).
items.zh: 编程：使用 EvalPlus (Chen 等, 2021)、MultiPL-E (Cassano 等, 2022)、MBPP (Austin 等, 2021)、CRUXEval (Gu 等, 2024) 和 LiveCodeBench (Jain 等, 2024) 评估编程能力。

items.en: Evaluation Settings and Baselines. We adhere to standard evaluation protocols across benchmarks, including established metrics and shot configurations. Specifically, we employ zero-shot for TriviaQA, PIQA, C3, EvalPlus, MultiPL-E, LiveCodeBench, CRUXEval, and CCPM; 3-shot evaluation for BBH, MBPP, and DROP; 4-shot evaluation for GSM8K, MATH, and CMATH; 5-shot evaluation for MMLU, MMLU-Pro, MMLU-Redux, SuperGPQA, C-Eval, CMMLU, WinoGrande, and NaturalQuestions; 7-shot evaluation for CommonsenseQA; 8-shot evaluation for MGSM; 10-shot evaluation for HellaSwag; 25-shot evaluation for ARC-C. We compare Hunyuan-TurboS against state-of-the-art pre-trained base models of comparable parameter scales, including: Llama-4-Maverick (Meta, 2025), DeepSeek-V3 (Liu et al., 2024), and Qwen3-235B-A22B (Yang et al., 2025a). Owing to the architectural advantage of Mamba2 and Attention hybrid design, our model achieves significantly lower downstream deployment costs. For fairness, we report the highest performance among publicly available results.
items.zh: 评估设置与基线。我们遵循各基准的标准评估协议，包括既定指标和样本配置。具体而言，我们对 TriviaQA、PIQA、C3、EvalPlus、MultiPL-E、LiveCodeBench、CRUXEval 和 CCPM 采用零样本评估；对 BBH、MBPP 和 DROP 采用 3 样本评估；对 GSM8K、MATH 和 CMATH 采用 4 样本评估；对 MMLU、MMLU-Pro、MMLU-Redux、SuperGPQA、C-Eval、CMMLU、WinoGrande 和 NaturalQuestions 采用 5 样本评估；对 CommonsenseQA 采用 7 样本评估；对 MGSM 采用 8 样本评估；对 HellaSwag 采用 10 样本评估；对 ARC-C 采用 25 样本评估。我们将 Hunyuan-TurboS 与参数规模相当的最先进预训练基础模型进行比较，包括：Llama-4-Maverick (Meta, 2025)、DeepSeek-V3 (Liu 等, 2024) 和 Qwen3-235B-A22B (Yang 等, 2025a)。得益于 Mamba2 和注意力机制的混合架构优势，我们的模型显著降低了下游部署成本。为公平起见，我们报告公开结果中的最高性能。

items.en: As illustrated in Table 2, the results demonstrate the robust capabilities of Hunyuan-TurboS compared to other state-of-the-art models. As the largest model in this comparison with 56B activated parameters and 560B total parameters, Hunyuan-TurboS delivers leading performance across multiple domains while maintaining efficient inference capabilities through optimized hybrid Mamba2, Attention, and MoE architecture.
items.zh: 如表 2 所示，结果展示了 Hunyuan-TurboS 相对于其他最先进模型的强大能力。作为本次比较中最大的模型，拥有 560B 总参数和 56B 激活参数，Hunyuan-TurboS 在多个领域均取得领先性能，同时通过优化的混合 Mamba2、注意力机制和 MoE 架构保持高效的推理能力。

items.en: In English tasks, Hunyuan-TurboS achieves first-tier results, notably attaining 54.63 on SuperGPQA (exceeding all competitors by over 10%) and 89.76 on BBH. While slightly trailing Qwen3-235B-A22B in MMLU-Redux (87.11 vs 87.40), our model demonstrates particularly strong reasoning capabilities with 92.22 on TriviaQA. Besides, Hunyuan-TurboS shows balanced strengths across various domains, achieving nearly state-of-the-art performance in WinoGrande (86.5) and PIQA (86.7). For Chinese capabilities, Hunyuan-TurboS reaches new height with 90.57 on CMMLU while maintaining competitive performance on C-Eval (88.7). Mathematical reasoning showcases Hunyuan-TurboS's most dramatic improvements, achieving 81.4 on MATH while maintaining parity with Qwen3-235B-A22B on GSM8K (both 94.39). Coding tasks emerges as another standout domain, where our model achieves the overall highest score compared to other models.
items.zh: 在英语任务中，Hunyuan-TurboS 取得了一流结果，尤其在 SuperGPQA 上达到 54.63（超过所有竞争对手 10% 以上），在 BBH 上达到 89.76。虽然在 MMLU-Redux 上略低于 Qwen3-235B-A22B（87.11 vs 87.40），但我们的模型在 TriviaQA 上以 92.22 的成绩展现出特别强大的推理能力。此外，Hunyuan-TurboS 在多个领域展现出均衡优势，在 WinoGrande（86.5）和 PIQA（86.7）上达到近乎最先进的性能。在中文能力方面，Hunyuan-TurboS 在 CMMLU 上达到 90.57 的新高度，同时在 C-Eval（88.7）上保持竞争力。数学推理展示了 Hunyuan-TurboS 最显著的改进，在 MATH 上达到 81.4，同时在 GSM8K 上与 Qwen3-235B-A22B 持平（均为 94.39）。编程任务成为另一个突出领域，我们的模型相比其他模型取得了总体最高分。

items.capEn: Figure 3: A diagram illustrating the four steps of Hunyuan-TurboS post-training.
items.capZh: 图 3：说明 Hunyuan-TurboS 后训练四个步骤的示意图。

items.en: As shown in the Figure 3, our approach to post-train Hunyuan-TurboS encompasses four critical modules:
items.zh: 如图 3 所示，我们对 Hunyuan-TurboS 进行后训练的方法包含四个关键模块：

items.en: Supervised Fine-Tuning: We categorize instruction data collection by comprehensively delineated topics across diverse domains. This methodical approach facilitates specialized data curation while implementing multi-dimensional metrics for rigorous filtering and quality assurance, establishing a robust foundation for the model's fundamental capabilities.
items.zh: 监督微调：我们通过跨不同领域的全面细分主题对指令数据收集进行分类。这种系统化的方法有助于专门的数据整理，同时实施多维指标进行严格过滤和质量保证，为模型的基础能力奠定坚实基础。

items.en: Adaptive Long-short Chain-of-Thought Fusion: We propose a novel method to enable the model to autonomously select optimal reasoning strategies and efficiently allocate computational resources based on task requirements. This approach also enhances the readability of responses through lossless compression and reformatting of lengthy chains of thoughts.
items.zh: 自适应长短思维链融合：我们提出了一种新方法，使模型能够根据任务需求自主选择最优推理策略并高效分配计算资源。该方法还通过对长思维链进行无损压缩和重新格式化，增强了回复的可读性。

items.en: Multi-round Deliberation Learning: The SFT model will compete with other cutting-edge Hunyuan models across an extensive instruction collection, with a strategic focus on identifying and addressing capability gaps between Hunyuan-TurboS and other top-tier Hunyuan models.
items.zh: 多轮审议学习：SFT 模型将与大量指令集合中的其他尖端 Hunyuan 模型竞争，战略重点是识别和解决 Hunyuan-TurboS 与其他顶级 Hunyuan 模型之间的能力差距。

items.en: Two-stage Large-scale Reinforcement Learning: Our reinforcement learning begins with STEM-focused GRPO training to enhance reasoning capabilities, followed by general domain GRPO to improve instruction-following proficiency across all areas.
items.zh: 两阶段大规模强化学习：我们的强化学习首先从以 STEM 为重点的 GRPO 训练开始，以增强推理能力，随后进行通用领域 GRPO，以提高所有领域的指令遵循能力。

items.en: This section details the supervised fine-tuning (SFT) phase of Hunyuan-TurboS. Quality and diversity of SFT data are critical for LLM performance across diverse tasks. We categorize SFT data into fine-grained topics, curating high-quality samples for each and integrating them into a unified dataset. The data construction for each topic is detailed below.
items.zh: 本节详细介绍了 Hunyuan-TurboS 的监督微调（SFT）阶段。SFT 数据的质量和多样性对于 LLM 在不同任务上的性能至关重要。我们将 SFT 数据细分为细粒度主题，为每个主题整理高质量样本，并将其整合到统一数据集中。每个主题的数据构建如下所述。

items.en: Math: We collect math problems from diverse educational sources (textbooks, exams, competitions), spanning difficulties from elementary to academic competitions. Generative reward models and verifiers ensure CoT quality through evaluation and iterative refinement.
items.zh: 数学：我们从多种教育来源（教科书、考试、竞赛）收集数学问题，难度涵盖从小学到学术竞赛。生成式奖励模型和验证器通过评估和迭代优化确保 CoT 质量。

items.en: Coding: A pipeline creates high-quality instruction data from source code. Code snippets from open-source repositories (e.g., GitHub) are transformed into instructional pairs (Wei et al., 2024), categorized and optimized for diverse task types, languages, and knowledge. Data quality is ensured by multi-stage filtering with critic models and sandbox execution.
items.zh: 编程：一个流水线从源代码创建高质量的指令数据。来自开源仓库（如 GitHub）的代码片段被转换为指令对（Wei 等, 2024），并根据不同的任务类型、语言和知识进行分类和优化。通过使用评论模型和沙盒执行的多阶段过滤确保数据质量。

items.en: Logic: We extract data from public/licensed sources and use an automated synthesis pipeline (akin to ZebraLogic (Lin et al., 2025)) to scale volume. Data is categorized by question type and difficulty. Quality is ensured by tiered validation: models for standard cases, human experts for complex ones, balancing accuracy and efficiency.
items.zh: 逻辑：我们从公共/许可来源提取数据，并使用自动化合成流水线（类似于 ZebraLogic (Lin 等, 2025)）来扩展规模。数据按问题类型和难度进行分类。通过分层验证确保质量：标准情况使用模型，复杂情况由人类专家处理，平衡准确性和效率。

items.en: Science: We collected diverse data (physics, chemistry, biology) from middle school to graduate level. LLMs mark difficulty/quality; difficult questions (e.g., Olympiads, university-level) are selected for post-training. An LLM-based Verifier with CoT checks if generated answers match references, handling complex checks like unit conversion, approximations, and equivalent forms (e.g., chemical names, equations).
items.zh: 科学：我们收集了从中学到研究生水平的多样化数据（物理、化学、生物）。LLM 标记难度/质量；选择困难问题（如奥林匹克竞赛、大学水平）用于后训练。一个基于 LLM 的验证器结合 CoT 检查生成的答案是否与参考答案匹配，处理复杂检查，如单位转换、近似值和等价形式（例如化学名称、方程式）。

items.en: Language-Centric Tasks: Focuses on language understanding, translation, and generation. Strict filtering and rewriting ensure data quality; model verification removes meaningless/ambiguous instructions. Generative reward models score responses via joint evaluation of paired responses, mitigating reward hacking. Expert rewriting and iterative refinement further optimize outputs.
items.zh: 语言中心任务：侧重于语言理解、翻译和生成。严格的过滤和重写确保数据质量；模型验证去除无意义/模糊的指令。生成式奖励模型通过配对响应的联合评估对响应进行评分，减轻奖励黑客攻击。专家重写和迭代优化进一步优化输出。

items.en: Creative Writing: Multi-dimensional labels (genre, style, etc.) ensure instruction set richness and diversity. A discriminant RM filters samples with low scores/high variance to retain valuable instructions. Expert rewriting and model self-refinement build high-quality responses.
items.zh: 创意写作：多维标签（体裁、风格等）确保指令集的丰富性和多样性。一个判别式 RM 过滤低分数/高方差的样本，以保留有价值的指令。专家重写和模型自我精炼构建高质量响应。

items.en: English and Multilingual: Diverse instruction data are created through document augmentation, instruction evolution (Xu et al., 2024), and back-translation (Li et al., 2023b). A well-trained team of human experts will annotate high-quality responses.
items.zh: 英语和多语言：通过文档增强、指令进化（Xu 等, 2024）和反向翻译（Li 等, 2023b）创建多样化的指令数据。一支训练有素的人类专家团队将标注高质量响应。

items.en: Complex Instruction: For complex instructions, we vary constraint numbers/types for difficulty, with rule-based filters checking satisfaction. For long-context, questions require integrating multiple context segments. For agent, diverse scenarios are created by combining tool usage, decision types, and multi-turn dynamics.
items.zh: 复杂指令：对于复杂指令，我们改变约束数量/类型以调整难度，使用基于规则的过滤器检查满足情况。对于长上下文，问题需要整合多个上下文片段。对于智能体，通过结合工具使用、决策类型和多轮动态创建多样化场景。

items.en: Role Play: Diverse character profiles are created from typical personality traits. Conversational data is generated via prompt engineering, with responses assessed for instruction comprehension, trait representation, and emotional empathy.
items.zh: 角色扮演：根据典型人格特质创建多样化的角色档案。通过提示工程生成对话数据，并评估回复在指令理解、特质表现和情感共情方面的表现。

items.en: Knowledge QA: To reduce hallucinations, we optimize performance on knowledge-intensive tasks. For general knowledge, cross-validation and critic models filter errors and select best answers (Ke et al., 2024; Wang et al., 2024a).
items.zh: 知识问答：为减少幻觉，我们优化知识密集型任务的性能。对于通用知识，通过交叉验证和评判模型过滤错误并选择最佳答案（Ke 等，2024；Wang 等，2024a）。

items.en: Multi-turn: Multi-turn dialogues are divided into 6 categories. For each, diverse data is constructed via open-source collection, procurement, synthesis, instruction evolution, and pseudo-multi-turn synthesis.
items.zh: 多轮对话：多轮对话被分为6个类别。针对每个类别，通过开源收集、采购、合成、指令进化和伪多轮合成构建多样化数据。

items.en: Finance/Legal/Medical: Experts in legal, financial, and medical fields label data for high-quality training sets.
items.zh: 金融/法律/医疗：法律、金融和医疗领域的专家为高质量训练集标注数据。

items.en: Safety: Nearly 1,000 safety categories measure diversity and coverage to address vulnerabilities. A classification model continuously identifies risky data. A red team conducts adversarial testing to uncover security flaws.
items.zh: 安全：近1000个安全类别衡量多样性和覆盖范围以解决漏洞。一个分类模型持续识别风险数据。红队进行对抗性测试以发现安全缺陷。

items.en: Based on above topics, we create an SFT dataset of 3 million samples (reasoning and non-reasoning). Complex reasoning tasks requiring longer CoT undergo additional processing:
items.zh: 基于上述主题，我们创建了一个包含300万样本的SFT数据集（推理和非推理）。需要更长思维链的复杂推理任务需额外处理：

items.en: Reasoning Data. Math, coding, science and logic are categorized as reasoning data. While models like DeepSeek-R1 (Guo et al., 2025) and OpenAI-o1 (OpenAI, 2024b) improve on such tasks, they can overthink simple questions. We create adaptive long-short CoT responses using an internal teacher model (Section 3.2) to address this. Unlike prior work (DeepSeek-AI et al., 2025; Yang et al., 2025b) using system prompts, our reasoning data is uniformly structured as <<problem, response>>, with responses potentially including detailed reasoning. This allows the model to dynamically activate thinking mode based on problem difficulty.
items.zh: 推理数据。数学、编程、科学和逻辑被归类为推理数据。虽然DeepSeek-R1（Guo 等，2025）和OpenAI-o1（OpenAI，2024b）等模型在这些任务上有所改进，但它们可能对简单问题过度思考。我们使用内部教师模型（第3.2节）创建自适应长-短思维链回复来解决这一问题。与先前使用系统提示的工作（DeepSeek-AI 等，2025；Yang 等，2025b）不同，我们的推理数据统一结构为<<问题，回复>>，回复可能包含详细推理。这使得模型能够根据问题难度动态激活思考模式。

items.en: Non-Reasoning Data. For non-reasoning data, original responses from diverse topics are used directly in SFT.
items.zh: 非推理数据。对于非推理数据，直接使用来自不同主题的原始回复进行SFT。

full.secZh: 3.2 自适应长短思维链融合

items.en: The short chain-of-thought mode excels at quick, heuristic decision-making and is suitable for solving simple problems. The long chain-of-thought mode relies on deep reasoning to make more accurate judgments and reduce biases, making it appropriate for complex problems. If an LLM operates solely in the short CoT mode, it struggles with complex and difficult problems. Conversely, if it operates only in the long CoT mode, many everyday problems requiring quick responses would consume excessive inference resources. We propose an adaptive long-short CoT fusion method that creatively integrates these two reasoning modes into a single model, allowing the LLM to autonomously decide whether to use long or short CoT and determine the depth of reasoning based on the complexity of the problem. Previous studies (Guo et al., 2025; OpenAI, 2024b) have revealed that long CoT is particularly effective in reasoning fields such as mathematics. Therefore, we apply adaptive long-short CoT fusion for reasoning data (e.g., mathematics, STEM), while primarily utilizing the short CoT mode for non-reasoning data. We trained an adaptive long-short CoT fusion teacher model to generate training data for the first SFT stage of Hunyuan-TurboS. The training of this teacher model includes two stages: supervised fine-tuning and reinforcement learning.
items.zh: 短思维链模式擅长快速、启发式决策，适用于解决简单问题。长思维链模式依赖深度推理以做出更准确的判断并减少偏差，适用于复杂问题。如果LLM仅以短思维链模式运行，则难以处理复杂困难问题。反之，如果仅以长思维链模式运行，许多需要快速响应的日常问题将消耗过多推理资源。我们提出一种自适应长-短思维链融合方法，创造性地将这两种推理模式集成到单个模型中，使LLM能够根据问题复杂度自主决定使用长或短思维链并确定推理深度。先前研究（Guo 等，2025；OpenAI，2024b）已揭示长思维链在数学等推理领域特别有效。因此，我们对推理数据（如数学、STEM）应用自适应长-短思维链融合，而对非推理数据主要使用短思维链模式。我们训练了一个自适应长-短思维链融合教师模型，为Hunyuan-TurboS的第一阶段SFT生成训练数据。该教师模型的训练包括两个阶段：监督微调和强化学习。

items.en: First, we train Hunyuan-Base to obtain a short CoT model using reasoning data. Then, we use this model to infer answers on all reasoning data and perform consistency checks. For one data sample, if the short CoT model gives a correct answer, it will be directly added as a training sample. If the short CoT model gets it wrong on the first attempt, we will feed the question and the short CoT's incorrect response into Hunyuan-T1 to continue generating the subsequent reasoning process and answer, and then convert this extended reasoning process and answer into the short CoT response style. We will repeatedly apply this Hunyuan-T1 generation process until a correct answer is obtained for the given question. Then, we will concatenate all failed attempts along with the correct response to serve as the training response for our adaptive long-short fusion teacher model.Finally, we use the adaptive short-long CoT data generated through the process described above to train Hunyuan-Base, thereby obtaining an adaptive SFT model.
items.zh: 首先，我们使用推理数据训练Hunyuan-Base以获得短思维链模型。然后，使用该模型对所有推理数据推断答案并进行一致性检查。对于一个数据样本，如果短思维链模型给出正确答案，则直接将其添加为训练样本。如果短思维链模型首次尝试错误，我们将问题及短思维链的错误回复输入Hunyuan-T1，继续生成后续推理过程和答案，然后将此扩展的推理过程和答案转换为短思维链回复风格。我们将重复应用此Hunyuan-T1生成过程，直到获得给定问题的正确答案。然后，将所有失败尝试与正确回复拼接，作为自适应长-短融合教师模型的训练回复。最后，我们使用上述过程生成的自适应短-长思维链数据训练Hunyuan-Base，从而获得自适应SFT模型。

items.en: Our long-short adaptive reward framework enables LLMs to choose appropriate thinking modes based on problem difficulty:
items.zh: 我们的长-短自适应奖励框架使LLM能够根据问题难度选择合适的思考模式：

items.en: Difficulty-Adaptive Reward: During GRPO sampling, we generate responses with varying depths of reasoning for each prompt. An online rejection sampling mechanism evaluates prompt difficulty and selects the appropriate mode—assigning long CoT to complex problems and short CoT to simpler ones.
items.zh: 难度自适应奖励：在GRPO采样期间，我们为每个提示生成不同推理深度的回复。一种在线拒绝采样机制评估提示难度并选择适当模式——为复杂问题分配长思维链，为简单问题分配短思维链。

items.en: Long CoT Compression Reward: For long reasoning chains, we apply a length penalty during the calculation of the reward. When multiple reasoning paths achieve equal correctness, shorter traces receive higher rewards, minimizing redundancy while maintaining accuracy.
items.zh: 长思维链压缩奖励：对于长推理链，我们在计算奖励时应用长度惩罚。当多个推理路径达到相同正确性时，较短的轨迹获得更高奖励，从而在保持准确性的同时最小化冗余。

items.en: The proposed reinforce framework generates significantly adaptive CoTs, achieving a balance between reasoning quality and computational efficiency.
items.zh: 所提出的强化框架生成显著自适应的思维链，实现了推理质量与计算效率之间的平衡。

items.en: To enhance the capabilities of our Hunyuan-TurboS after its initial pre-training and foundational SFT, and inspired by Luo et al. (2024), we propose a new iterative refinement strategy of human-LLM collaboration grounded in the principles of Deliberation Learning. This approach leverages a data flywheel, where models progressively improve by competing with each other, with weakness profiles identified by powerful LLM-based judges and human experts to inform subsequent SFT iterations.
items.zh: 为了在初始预训练和基础SFT后增强Hunyuan-TurboS的能力，受Luo等（2024）启发，我们提出一种基于深思学习原则的人-LLM协作迭代优化新策略。该方法利用数据飞轮，模型通过相互竞争逐步改进，由强大的基于LLM的评判者和人类专家识别弱点特征，以指导后续SFT迭代。

items.en: To effectively simulate human annotators and mitigate individual LLM biases, we developed and trained a panel of Judge Models based on Hunyuan-TurboS. Instead of relying on a single holistic score, model responses were assessed across multiple predefined dimensions: accuracy, helpfulness, harmlessness, coherence, conciseness, and adherence to instructions. For each pairwise comparison, each judge provided scores along these dimensions, often supplementing them with textual rationales. A consensus mechanism, such as majority voting or a weighted scoring system, aggregated these multi-dimensional judgments. This multi-judge, multi-dimensional approach was designed to bolster the robustness of our evaluations and more closely align automated judgments with human preferences. Furthermore, the judging protocol underwent regular calibration against evaluations from human experts to ensure its continuous refinement.
items.zh: 为有效模拟人类标注者并减轻单个LLM的偏差，我们基于Hunyuan-TurboS开发并训练了一个评判模型面板。模型回复在多个预定义维度上评估：准确性、有用性、无害性、连贯性、简洁性和指令遵循，而非依赖单一整体评分。对于每对比较，每个评判者提供这些维度的评分，并常辅以文本理由。共识机制（如多数投票或加权评分系统）聚合这些多维判断。这种多评判者、多维方法旨在增强评估的鲁棒性，并使自动判断更接近人类偏好。此外，评判协议定期根据人类专家评估进行校准，以确保其持续改进。

items.en: Our core innovation lies in an iterative improvement cycle that continuously enhances Hunyuan-TurboS' capabilities through competitive evaluation and targeted Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT). This cyclical process encompasses three key phases:
items.zh: 我们的核心创新在于一个迭代改进循环，通过竞争性评估和有针对性的监督微调（SFT）持续增强Hunyuan-TurboS的能力。该循环过程包括三个关键阶段：

items.en: Judging: We initialize a competitive environment with our Hunyuan-TurboS SFT model and our cutting-edge Hunyuan models, such as Hunyuan Large, Hunyuan Turbo, and Hunyuan T1. In each pair-wise comparison, all models generate responses to identical prompts from our curated training split. These responses are then meticulously assessed by our multi-LLM judge ensemble.
items.zh: 评判：我们使用Hunyuan-TurboS SFT模型和我们的尖端Hunyuan模型（如Hunyuan Large、Hunyuan Turbo和Hunyuan T1）初始化竞争环境。在每对比较中，所有模型对来自我们精心策划的训练分区的相同提示生成回复。这些回复随后由我们的多LLM评判集成进行细致评估。

items.en: Weakness Deliberation: We identify model weaknesses using human expert and LLM oversight. While automated metrics offer initial indicators, domain experts review intricate comparison outcomes and nuanced model failures missed by automated systems. Experts compare Hunyuan-TurboS with competitors, using deep contextual understanding to find capability gaps across diverse domains, tasks, and challenging prompts. This expert analysis, often with collaborative adjudication, creates a detailed "weakness profile" informing data selection and augmentation.
items.zh: 弱点深思：我们利用人类专家和LLM监督识别模型弱点。虽然自动指标提供初步指示，但领域专家审查自动系统遗漏的复杂比较结果和细微模型失败。专家将Hunyuan-TurboS与竞争对手进行比较，利用深层上下文理解发现跨不同领域、任务和具有挑战性提示的能力差距。这种专家分析通常伴有协作裁决，创建详细的“弱点档案”，为数据选择和增强提供信息。

items.en: Iterative SFT: Guided by this profile, we develop tailored training batches for identified deficiencies frequently incorporating "loss data". These training batches will be carefully annotated by human experts with high-quality outputs, which will be added incrementally to the training process. Our approach uses curriculum learning, progressively increasing task complexity and skill subtlety as the model shows mastery. After each SFT iteration, the updated model is re-evaluated, closing the loop and perpetuating the data flywheel. This cyclical refinement yields incremental enhancements for identified weaknesses. Our methodology aims to preserve strengths while addressing deficiencies, fostering robust and well-rounded performance.
items.zh: 迭代SFT：在此档案指导下，我们针对已识别的缺陷开发定制训练批次，这些缺陷常包含“损失数据”。这些训练批次将由人类专家仔细标注高质量输出，并逐步添加到训练过程中。我们的方法使用课程学习，随着模型掌握程度提高，逐步增加任务复杂性和技能细微度。每次SFT迭代后，更新后的模型被重新评估，从而闭合循环并延续数据飞轮。这种循环优化为已识别的弱点带来增量改进。我们的方法旨在保持优势的同时解决缺陷，促进稳健且全面的性能。

items.en: To facilitate effective reinforcement learning, we design a general reward system organized around three key components: a Generative Reward Model with reference answers that covers most scenarios, an Answer Consistency Model for tasks such as mathematics where ground-truth answers exist, a code Sandbox that executes unit tests for programming problems. Finally, a Reward Aggregation module incorporates domain-specific rules to produce a unified score. Overall, the system spans 16 sub-topics and more than 30 scoring services, each of which relies on specialized models or rule-based heuristics tailored to its specific evaluation scenario.
items.zh: 为促进有效的强化学习，我们设计了一个通用奖励系统，围绕三个关键组件组织：一个带有参考答案的生成式奖励模型，覆盖大多数场景；一个答案一致性模型，用于数学等存在真实答案的任务；一个代码沙箱，用于执行编程问题的单元测试。最后，奖励聚合模块结合领域特定规则生成统一分数。总体而言，该系统涵盖16个子主题和超过30个评分服务，每个服务都依赖于针对其特定评估场景定制的专用模型或基于规则的启发式方法。

items.en: Generative Reward Model with Reference Answer. Following (Zhang et al., 2024; Mahan et al., 2024; Xu et al., 2025), we employ a generative reward model (GRM) that compares candidate answers against a reference answer. For tasks with a single deterministic solution, such as closed-book factual QA, the reference is the ground-truth answer. For open-ended tasks (e.g., creative writing or open-domain dialogue) we still provide a carefully curated reference; however, the GRM treats it only as a semantic anchor rather than expecting an exact match.
items.zh: 带参考答案的生成式奖励模型。遵循（Zhang et al., 2024; Mahan et al., 2024; Xu et al., 2025），我们采用生成式奖励模型（GRM），将候选答案与参考答案进行比较。对于具有单一确定性解的任务，如闭卷事实性问答，参考答案即为真实答案。对于开放式任务（例如，创意写作或开放域对话），我们仍然提供精心策划的参考答案；然而，GRM仅将其视为语义锚点，而非期望精确匹配。

items.en: We train the GRM using a pairwise preference scheme: given two candidate answers to the same prompt, it predicts which one is better. To construct the training corpus, we sample diverse responses from multiple Hunyuan-TurboS checkpoints, ensuring broad coverage. Human annotators then label these pairs, achieving inter-annotator agreement above 93%. In total, we collect about 200K high-confidence annotations. To mitigate the well-known position bias, we swap the left/right order of the candidates to augment the training data.
items.zh: 我们使用成对偏好方案训练GRM：给定同一提示的两个候选答案，它预测哪个更好。为构建训练语料，我们从多个Hunyuan-TurboS检查点中采样多样化的响应，确保广泛覆盖。然后，人工标注者对这些对进行标注，实现超过93%的标注者间一致性。总共，我们收集了约20万条高置信度标注。为缓解已知的位置偏差，我们交换候选答案的左右顺序以扩充训练数据。

items.en: The GRM can optionally ingest Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning traces, yielding a variant we call GRM-CoT. Supplying rationales markedly improves judgment accuracy on multi-step reasoning tasks, albeit at increased computational cost. We also employ a critic model capable of invoking external tools for verification. The critic reports explicit length statistics and checks outputs against task-specific constraints. Leveraging the GRM-CoT approach together with carefully crafted prompts, the critic assesses answer correctness.
items.zh: GRM可以选择性地引入思维链（CoT）推理轨迹，产生一个我们称为GRM-CoT的变体。提供推理过程显著提高了多步推理任务的判断准确性，尽管增加了计算成本。我们还使用了一个批评模型，能够调用外部工具进行验证。批评模型报告显式的长度统计信息，并根据任务特定约束检查输出。利用GRM-CoT方法结合精心设计的提示，批评模型评估答案的正确性。

items.en: Answer Consistency Model. This lightweight classifier verifies if the generated final answer matches the reference, providing a binary reward (1 for a match, 0 otherwise). It is designed to normalize superficial differences, such as variations in whitespace, unit formats, or synonyms, to minimize false negatives. Due to its speed and robustness, this model serves as both a hard filter during data curation and a complementary reward signal during RL training.
items.zh: 答案一致性模型。这个轻量级分类器验证生成的最终答案是否与参考答案匹配，提供二元奖励（匹配为1，否则为0）。它旨在规范化表面差异，如空白、单位格式或同义词的变化，以最小化假阴性。由于其速度和鲁棒性，该模型在数据整理期间既作为硬过滤器，又在RL训练期间作为补充奖励信号。

items.en: Sandbox. We have built a multilingual code sandbox that supports 36 programming languages. These include, but are not limited to, Python, C, C++, Java, Go, JavaScript, C#, CoffeeScript, Common Lisp, Dart, Elixir, Emacs Lisp, Erlang, F#, Fortran, Groovy, Haskell, Julia, Kotlin, Lua, Pascal, Perl, PHP, PowerShell, Racket, R, Ruby, Rust, Scala, Scheme, Shell, Swift, Tcl, TypeScript, VimScript, and Visual Basic. The code sandbox is deployed on a distributed CPU cluster capable of handling over 1000 concurrent executions. Strict security measures such as file and network isolation are in place to prevent the execution of harmful code.
items.zh: 沙箱。我们构建了一个多语言代码沙箱，支持36种编程语言。这些语言包括但不限于Python、C、C++、Java、Go、JavaScript、C#、CoffeeScript、Common Lisp、Dart、Elixir、Emacs Lisp、Erlang、F#、Fortran、Groovy、Haskell、Julia、Kotlin、Lua、Pascal、Perl、PHP、PowerShell、Racket、R、Ruby、Rust、Scala、Scheme、Shell、Swift、Tcl、TypeScript、VimScript和Visual Basic。代码沙箱部署在分布式CPU集群上，能够处理超过1000个并发执行。采取了严格的安全措施，如文件和网络隔离，以防止执行有害代码。

items.en: To address imbalances and insufficient diversity in the post-training data such as skewed distributions and a lack of challenging cases, we have developed a multi-level knowledge classification framework that covers over 400 categories and 13K tags. This system ensures diverse prompt generation through data distribution adjustments and incorporates a difficulty grading mechanism based on the number and complexity of instructions.
items.zh: 为解决后训练数据中的不平衡和多样性不足问题，例如偏斜分布和缺乏具有挑战性的案例，我们开发了一个多级知识分类框架，涵盖超过400个类别和13K个标签。该系统通过数据分布调整确保多样化的提示生成，并基于指令的数量和复杂度纳入难度分级机制。

items.en: By leveraging high-quality open-source seed code fragments and pre-training data, we synthesize executable code complete with unit tests. Our approach considers boundary cases in inputs to yield verified outputs via sandbox execution. In total, over 800K executable, unit-tested data samples have been created, with mainstream programming languages (Python, C, C++, Java, Go, and JavaScript) contributing 100K samples each and long-tail languages contributing 10K samples each.
items.zh: 通过利用高质量的开源种子代码片段和预训练数据，我们合成了带有单元测试的可执行代码。我们的方法考虑输入的边界情况，通过沙箱执行生成验证过的输出。总共创建了超过80万个可执行、经过单元测试的数据样本，主流编程语言（Python、C、C++、Java、Go和JavaScript）各贡献10万个样本，长尾语言各贡献1万个样本。

items.en: Reward Aggregation. A single prompt may trigger multiple scoring services. The outputs from these services are applied with domain-specific custom rules and then combined by scoring fusion. We aggregate complementary scores, for example, by merging reward scores with repetition penalties, or by combining scores from creative evaluation models with those from critic models. During RL training, directly using raw reward values can lead to instability in advantage estimation. We therefore introduce group-level normalization. For each prompt, rewards within a group of generated responses are rescaled such that poorly performing answers receive negative advantages and well-performing answers receive positive advantages. This ensures more stable policy updates during RL training.
items.zh: 奖励聚合。单个提示可能触发多个评分服务。这些服务的输出应用领域特定的自定义规则，然后通过评分融合进行组合。我们聚合互补分数，例如，将奖励分数与重复惩罚合并，或将创意评估模型的分数与批评模型的分数结合。在RL训练期间，直接使用原始奖励值可能导致优势估计不稳定。因此，我们引入组级归一化。对于每个提示，一组生成响应中的奖励被重新缩放，使得表现较差的答案获得负优势，表现良好的答案获得正优势。这确保了RL训练期间策略更新更稳定。

items.en: To align and optimize our language models for diverse, domain-specific requirements, we adopt an incremental, domain-focused reinforcement learning (RL) pipeline based on the Generative Reward Preference Optimization (GRPO) framework (Shao et al., 2024). Our GRPO training involves a two-stage strategy, detailed below, alongside key implementation choices.
items.zh: 为了针对多样化的领域特定需求对齐和优化我们的语言模型，我们采用了一种基于生成式奖励偏好优化（GRPO）框架（Shao et al., 2024）的增量式、以领域为中心的强化学习（RL）流水线。我们的GRPO训练涉及一个两阶段策略，详情如下，以及关键实现选择。

items.en: Our GRPO training incrementally integrates knowledge and optimization objectives from multiple domains. For each domain, we curate specific datasets and define training recipes. The reward signals for these domains are derived from our General Reward System, and the resulting optimization tasks are merged into the main GRPO curriculum.
items.zh: 我们的GRPO训练增量式地整合来自多个领域的知识和优化目标。对于每个领域，我们策划特定数据集并定义训练方案。这些领域的奖励信号源自我们的通用奖励系统，由此产生的优化任务被合并到主要的GRPO课程中。

items.en: In Stage I, we enhance reasoning abilities (e.g., in domains such as Logic, Coding, Mathematics, and Science). In Stage II, we boost general performance (e.g., in domains such as Text Understanding, Translation, Long Context processing, and Creative Writing). We present the details of the two-stage GRPO with corresponding topic domains.
items.zh: 在第一阶段，我们增强推理能力（例如，在逻辑、编码、数学和科学等领域）。在第二阶段，我们提升通用性能（例如，在文本理解、翻译、长上下文处理和创意写作等领域）。我们展示了两个阶段GRPO的细节及相应的主题领域。

items.en: Stage I: Reasoning GRPO. This stage targets Logic, Coding, Mathematics, and Science domains. 300K training data are mixed with a ratio of Code : Mathematics : Logic&Science = 2 : 2 : 1. Given that the Supervised Fine-Tuned (SFT) backbone model already demonstrates strong performance on these tasks and exhibits low output entropy, we apply a relatively small Kullback-Leibler (KL) divergence constraint to encourage broader exploration during this stage.
items.zh: 第一阶段：推理GRPO。此阶段针对逻辑、编码、数学和科学领域。30万训练数据以代码：数学：逻辑与科学 = 2 : 2 : 1的比例混合。鉴于监督微调（SFT）骨干模型在这些任务上已表现出强大性能且输出熵较低，我们应用相对较小的Kullback-Leibler（KL）散度约束，以鼓励在此阶段进行更广泛的探索。

items.en: Each of the following reasoning domains is backed by its own reward service, dedicated preference data and evaluation rules, as well as domain-specific prompt construction.
items.zh: 以下每个推理领域都由其自己的奖励服务、专用偏好数据和评估规则以及领域特定的提示构建支持。

items.en: Logic. Prompts exhibiting instability, identified through high variance in accuracy across multiple generated samples, are targeted. A curated set of short-answer, validated items is used to strengthen the model's logical robustness.
items.zh: 逻辑。针对通过多个生成样本的准确率方差高而识别出的不稳定提示。使用一组精选的简答、验证过的项目来增强模型的逻辑鲁棒性。

items.en: Coding. Challenging programming prompts are selected and paired with automated evaluation systems. Rejection sampling and difficulty-aware filtering techniques are employed to curate high-quality data for RL.
items.zh: 编码。选择具有挑战性的编程提示，并与自动评估系统配对。采用拒绝采样和难度感知过滤技术来策划用于RL的高质量数据。

items.en: Mathematics. We collect challenging mathematical problems, excluding proof-based questions, multiple-choice, and true/false formats. Edge cases are converted into more tractable forms. Model-based rejection sampling is used to refine this corpus.
items.zh: 数学。我们收集具有挑战性的数学问题，排除基于证明的问题、选择题和判断题。边缘情况被转换为更易处理的形式。使用基于模型的拒绝采样来优化这个语料库。

items.en: Science. A generative verifier is trained to assess the consistency of answers against reference solutions. This model is capable of handling multi-step reasoning, unit conversions, approximations, formula equivalence, and chemical notations, thereby generating reward signals used for both rejection sampling and RL.
items.zh: 科学。训练一个生成式验证器来评估答案与参考解的一致性。该模型能够处理多步推理、单位转换、近似、公式等价和化学符号，从而生成用于拒绝采样和RL的奖励信号。

items.en: Stage II: General GRPO. In this stage, optimization is extended to general tasks, with a focus on balancing performance across various domains. We continue to include 10% reasoning data from Stage I in the training mix. Hyperparameters from Stage I (e.g., clipping range, learning rate) are largely retained, but the KL divergence penalty coefficient is increased to mitigate issues like catastrophic forgetting or performance collapse during training on 160k general RL instructions.
items.zh: 第二阶段：通用GRPO。在此阶段，优化扩展到通用任务，重点是在各个领域之间平衡性能。我们继续在训练混合中包含来自第一阶段的10%推理数据。第一阶段的大部分超参数（例如，裁剪范围、学习率）被保留，但KL散度惩罚系数增加，以缓解在16万条通用RL指令训练期间可能出现的灾难性遗忘或性能崩溃等问题。

items.en: To ensure balanced general capabilities, every subsequent track is supported by a dedicated reward service, corresponding preference datasets and rules, and specially designed data construction pipelines.
items.zh: 为确保平衡的通用能力，每个后续轨道都由一个专用的奖励服务、相应的偏好数据集和规则以及专门设计的数据构建流水线支持。

items.en: Text Understanding. Two reward models are utilized: a consistency model for objective Q&A and a comparative GRM for subjective or open-ended tasks.
items.zh: 文本理解。使用了两个奖励模型：一个用于客观问答的一致性模型和一个用于主观或开放任务的比较性GRM。

items.en: Translation. Domain experts annotate parallel corpora; GRMs trained on these annotations provide faithful reward signals.
items.zh: 翻译。领域专家标注平行语料库；在这些标注上训练的GRM提供可靠的奖励信号。

items.en: Long Context. For long-context tasks, an additional hallucination-focused critic model and online RL further enhance stability.
items.zh: 长上下文。对于长上下文任务，额外使用一个专注于幻觉的评论模型和在线强化学习进一步增强稳定性。

items.en: Creative Writing. For creative writing, paired GRMs based on relative preference judgments are used to mitigate reward hacking. During RL, creative rewards are blended with automated checks for instruction adherence, balancing creativity, fluency, and compliance.
items.zh: 创意写作。对于创意写作，使用基于相对偏好判断的配对GRM来缓解奖励破解。在强化学习过程中，创意奖励与指令遵循的自动检查相结合，平衡创造力、流畅性和合规性。

items.en: Agents. Action-level rule-based rewards and extensive step-wise data markedly improve multi-step reasoning capabilities.
items.zh: 智能体。基于动作的规则奖励和大量的逐步数据显著提升了多步推理能力。

items.en: Multi-Turn Dialogue. We refine dialogue-specific critic models and general rewards, mining unstable conversations.
items.zh: 多轮对话。我们优化了对话特定的评论模型和通用奖励，挖掘不稳定的对话。

items.en: Complex Instructions. We utilize constraint-extraction and satisfaction tools, complemented by general critic and reward models.
items.zh: 复杂指令。我们利用约束提取和满足工具，辅以通用评论和奖励模型。

items.en: Role-Playing. We evaluate instruction comprehension, character consistency, and empathy, then generate corresponding data using generalized critic and reward models.
items.zh: 角色扮演。我们评估指令理解、角色一致性和同理心，然后使用通用评论和奖励模型生成相应数据。

items.en: Safety. For safety alignment, safe response pairs are identified using classifiers and refusal heuristics, then incorporated into preference datasets.
items.zh: 安全性。对于安全对齐，使用分类器和拒绝启发式方法识别安全响应对，然后将其纳入偏好数据集。

items.en: Knowledge QA. For knowledge question-answering, rewards from hallucination detection models (both with and without access to references) and user-experience-focused models are jointly optimized to reduce hallucination risk.
items.zh: 知识问答。对于知识问答，来自幻觉检测模型（有参考和无参考）和以用户体验为中心的模型的奖励被联合优化，以降低幻觉风险。

items.en: Multilingual. For multilingual capabilities, SFT answers are sampled and scored using GRMs. A prompt is kept if it has high diversity, high answer variance and high quality.
items.zh: 多语言。对于多语言能力，使用GRM对SFT答案进行采样和评分。如果提示具有高多样性、高答案方差和高质量，则保留该提示。

items.en: Finance, Legal, and Medical Domains. For specialized domains like Finance, Legal, and Medical, consistency-based rewards identify unstable items from professional exams, which then supply preference data for targeted domain-specific improvements.
items.zh: 金融、法律和医疗领域。对于金融、法律和医疗等专业领域，基于一致性的奖励从专业考试中识别不稳定项目，然后为针对性的领域特定改进提供偏好数据。

items.en: Practical experience indicates that several engineering choices are decisive for achieving GRPO training that is both stable and sample-efficient. Following (Liu et al., 2024; Yu et al., ), we mention some additional details applied, unless otherwise noted, across all domains and training stages.
items.zh: 实践经验表明，几个工程选择对于实现稳定且样本高效的GRPO训练至关重要。遵循（Liu等人，2024；Yu等人），除非另有说明，我们在所有领域和训练阶段应用了一些额外细节。

items.en: GRPO Loss. We reformulate the GRPO loss at the token level, which markedly improves KL-stability during training. An approximate K3 KL loss term is clipped to the range [0, 10] to prevent issues arising from extreme log-probability spikes and potential divergence or model collapse. Best-of-N (BON) loss is applied selectively only to samples exhibiting positive advantage. This strategy helps preserve policy entropy, prevent premature convergence, and encourage continued exploration.
items.zh: GRPO损失。我们在词元级别重新表述了GRPO损失，这显著提高了训练期间的KL稳定性。一个近似的K3 KL损失项被裁剪到[0, 10]范围内，以防止极端对数概率尖峰以及潜在发散或模型崩溃引起的问题。Best-of-N（BON）损失仅选择性应用于表现出正优势的样本。该策略有助于保持策略熵，防止过早收敛，并鼓励持续探索。

items.en: Prompt Filtering. We filter prompts by excluding extreme cases where the model consistently succeeds or fails. Conversely, we retain unstable prompts, for which the model's sampled outputs show substantial disagreement, as these provide ideal adversarial examples for RL.
items.zh: 提示过滤。我们通过排除模型始终成功或失败的极端情况来过滤提示。相反，我们保留不稳定的提示，对于这些提示，模型的采样输出存在显著分歧，因为它们为强化学习提供了理想的对抗性示例。

items.en: Sampling. The sampling temperature for generating responses during RL is set to 1.0. Experiments with lower temperatures indicated that they led to rapid entropy decay, which hindered exploration and ultimately capped performance improvements. As model capabilities evolve during training, prompts that were once difficult may become trivial. Inspired by (Yu et al., ), we implement a dynamic sampling strategy. Samples yielding zero advantage are dropped during batch formation, which helps accelerate convergence and improve overall training stability.
items.zh: 采样。强化学习期间生成响应的采样温度设置为1.0。较低温度的实验表明，它们会导致熵快速衰减，阻碍探索，并最终限制性能提升。随着训练过程中模型能力的演变，曾经困难的提示可能变得微不足道。受（Yu等人）启发，我们实现了一种动态采样策略。在批次形成过程中，产生零优势的样本被丢弃，这有助于加速收敛并提高整体训练稳定性。

items.en: Group Reward Adjustment. Standard relative normalization can sometimes assign unintended positive advantages to poor-quality answers. Our group reward adjustment scheme addresses this by rescaling rewards within each prompt's response group, ensuring that undesirable responses receive negative advantages and desirable ones receive positive advantages, thereby promoting stable policy updates.
items.zh: 组奖励调整。标准相对归一化有时会无意中为低质量答案分配正优势。我们的组奖励调整方案通过重新缩放每个提示响应组内的奖励来解决这个问题，确保不良响应获得负优势，期望响应获得正优势，从而促进稳定的策略更新。

items.en: In this section, we report the performance of our model Hunyuan-TurboS-20250416 on LMSYS Chatbot Arena (Chiang et al., 2024). LMSYS Chatbot Arena uses blind side-by-side evaluations by human raters with less biases and more objective evaluation of the chatbots' capabilities. We report the overall rank in Table 3 and Appendix A, and the detailed results are as following:
items.zh: 在本节中，我们报告了我们的模型Hunyuan-TurboS-20250416在LMSYS Chatbot Arena（Chiang等人，2024）上的性能。LMSYS Chatbot Arena使用人类评估者的盲测并排评估，偏差更小，对聊天机器人能力的评估更客观。我们在表3和附录A中报告了总体排名，详细结果如下：

items.en: Hunyuan-TurboS-20250416 obtains an overall score of 1356, is among the top 7 best models in total 239 models, and outperforming leading reasoning models like o4-mini-2025-04-16.
items.zh: Hunyuan-TurboS-20250416获得总分1356，在总共239个模型中排名前7，优于领先的推理模型如o4-mini-2025-04-16。

items.en: Hunyuan-TurboS-20250416 achieves top 1 in Chinese, French, Spanish, and top 2 in Korean languages. This shows the comprehensiveness and advancement of our model in terms of multilingualism and internationalization.
items.zh: Hunyuan-TurboS-20250416在中文、法语、西班牙语中排名第一，在韩语中排名第二。这显示了我们的模型在多语言和国际化的全面性和先进性。

items.en: Hunyuan-TurboS-20250416 achieves top 5 in various main Arena tasks, such as Hard Prompts, Creative Writing, Multi-Turn, and Longer Queries.
items.zh: Hunyuan-TurboS-20250416 在各种主要 Arena 任务中排名前五，例如 Hard Prompts、Creative Writing、Multi-Turn 和 Longer Queries。

items.en: In Table 4, we show the performance of our model in key benchmarks, compared against several industry-leading models including open-source and closed-source. For closed-source models, evaluations are performed through their respective APIs. We conduct comprehensive evaluations of our model and focus on performance in knowledge, reasoning, mathematics, coding, Alignment Task, and instruction following. Hunyuan-TurboS achieves state-of-the-art performance on these dimensions and is comparable to leading models in the industry.
items.zh: 在表 4 中，我们展示了我们的模型在关键基准测试中的性能，并与包括开源和闭源在内的多个行业领先模型进行了比较。对于闭源模型，评估通过其各自的 API 进行。我们对模型进行了全面评估，重点关注知识、推理、数学、编码、对齐任务和指令遵循方面的性能。Hunyuan-TurboS 在这些维度上达到了最先进的性能，并与行业领先模型相当。

items.en: Mathematics: For mathematics skill, we utilize math benchmarks including MATH(5-shot), GSM8k(4-shot), and high-level competitions including AIME(2024, 2025), and OlympiadBench.
items.zh: 数学：对于数学技能，我们使用了数学基准测试，包括 MATH（5-shot）、GSM8k（4-shot）以及高级竞赛，包括 AIME（2024、2025）和 OlympiadBench。

items.en: Reasoning: For logical reasoning skills, we employ high-level benchmarks including BBH(3-shot), DROP(3-shot), and ZebraLogic.
items.zh: 推理：对于逻辑推理技能，我们采用了高级基准测试，包括 BBH（3-shot）、DROP（3-shot）和 ZebraLogic。

items.en: Coding: To test the model's ability in coding tasks, we use livecodeBench (2408-2411) and HumanEval.
items.zh: 编码：为了测试模型在编码任务中的能力，我们使用了 livecodeBench（2408-2411）和 HumanEval。

items.en: Knowledge & Chinese Tasks: We utilize benchmarks including MMLU(5-shot), MMLU-Pro(5-shot), GPQA-Diamond, C-Eval(5-shot), Chinese SimpleQA, and CMMLU(5-shot).
items.zh: 知识与中文任务：我们使用的基准测试包括 MMLU（5-shot）、MMLU-Pro（5-shot）、GPQA-Diamond、C-Eval（5-shot）、Chinese SimpleQA 和 CMMLU（5-shot）。

items.en: Alignment Tasks: To assess alignment with human preferences on general topics, we utilize AlignBench v1.1, MTBench, Arena-Hard, and AlpacaEval. The full score of both AlimentBench and MTBench is 10 points. When calculating the average scores for alignment tasks, we converted the scores to a 100-point scale through linear mapping.
items.zh: 对齐任务：为了评估在一般主题上与人类偏好的对齐，我们使用了 AlignBench v1.1、MTBench、Arena-Hard 和 AlpacaEval。AlignBench 和 MTBench 的满分均为 10 分。在计算对齐任务的平均分数时，我们通过线性映射将分数转换为 100 分制。

items.en: Instruction following: For instruction-following performance, we report accuracy of IFEval and score of SysBench, a benchmark that systematically analyzes system message following ability.
items.zh: 指令遵循：对于指令遵循性能，我们报告了 IFEval 的准确率和 SysBench 的分数，SysBench 是一个系统分析系统消息遵循能力的基准测试。

items.en: The Hunyuan-TurboS model demonstrates significant performance improvements through innovative methodologies including hybrid long-short chain-of-thought integration and multi-phase reinforcement learning. Our comprehensive evaluation reveals the following key findings:
items.zh: Hunyuan-TurboS 模型通过创新方法（包括混合长短思维链集成和多阶段强化学习）展示了显著的性能提升。我们的全面评估揭示了以下关键发现：

items.en: Mathematical Reasoning Hunyuan-TurboS achieves state-of-the-art performance among no-reasoning models, ranking second only to DeepSeek-v3-0324. The performance gap manifests primarily in AIME2024 and AIME2025 benchmarks (1-3 sample difference), while showing substantial advantages over other no-reasoning models across multiple datasets including GSM8k (hunyuan 94.4% vs gpt4.5 91.9%), MATH (hunyuan 90% vs gpt4.5 86.2%), and OlympiadBench (hunyuan 76.1% vs gpt4.5 67.6%).
items.zh: 数学推理：Hunyuan-TurboS 在非推理模型中达到了最先进的性能，仅次于 DeepSeek-v3-0324。性能差距主要体现在 AIME2024 和 AIME2025 基准测试中（1-3 个样本差异），而在多个数据集上，包括 GSM8k（混元 94.4% vs gpt4.5 91.9%）、MATH（混元 90% vs gpt4.5 86.2%）和 OlympiadBench（混元 76.1% vs gpt4.5 67.6%），相对于其他非推理模型具有显著优势。

items.en: Logical Reasoning On complex benchmark suites (BBH, DROP, Zebra-Logic), Hunyuan-TurboS and DeepSeek-V3-0324 establish new performance plateaus, demonstrating substantial advantages over conventional no-reasoning models.
items.zh: 逻辑推理：在复杂的基准测试套件（BBH、DROP、Zebra-Logic）上，Hunyuan-TurboS 和 DeepSeek-V3-0324 建立了新的性能平台，显示出相对于传统非推理模型的显著优势。

items.en: Coding Code generation capabilities are competitive with Qwen2.5-Max, showing equivalent performance to industry-leading models. The model shows significant advantages over Doubao1.5-Pro-32k (+6.0) and DeepSeek V3(+2.2) in programming tasks.
items.zh: 编码：代码生成能力与 Qwen2.5-Max 相当，表现出与行业领先模型同等的性能。该模型在编程任务中相对于 Doubao1.5-Pro-32k（+6.0）和 DeepSeek V3（+2.2）具有显著优势。

items.en: Knowledge & Chinese Tasks In terms of knowledge retention and factual accuracy, Hunyuan-TurboS achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance comparable to leading foundation models. Benchmark evaluations reveal its robust capabilities in knowledge-intensive tasks, with particularly strong performance on Chinese-oriented knowledge assessments including C-Eval, CMMLU, and C-SimpleQA.
items.zh: 知识与中文任务：在知识保留和事实准确性方面，Hunyuan-TurboS 达到了与领先基础模型相当的最先进（SOTA）性能。基准评估揭示了其在知识密集型任务中的强大能力，特别是在面向中文的知识评估中表现尤为突出，包括 C-Eval、CMMLU 和 C-SimpleQA。

items.en: Our evaluation demonstrates that Hunyuan-TurboS achieves significant performance improvements in alignment tasks, surpassing GPT-4.5 across multiple benchmarks. Specifically, Hunyuan-TurboS attains an average score 11.8 points higher than GPT-4.5 on AlpacaEval, while achieving state-of-the-art results with first-place rankings in both AlignmentBench and MTBench evaluations.
items.zh: 我们的评估表明，Hunyuan-TurboS 在对齐任务中取得了显著的性能提升，在多个基准测试上超越了 GPT-4.5。具体来说，Hunyuan-TurboS 在 AlpacaEval 上的平均得分比 GPT-4.5 高出 11.8 分，同时在 AlignmentBench 和 MTBench 评估中均获得第一名，达到了最先进的结果。

items.en: Instruction Following The model achieves state-of-the-art alignment performance, outperforming DeepSeek-V3-0324 by 5.0 points on IF-Eval. Its performance profile parallels Claude3.7 and GPT-4.5, with particularly strong results in multi-turn dialogue and constraint-based task execution.
items.zh: 指令遵循：该模型实现了最先进的对齐性能，在 IF-Eval 上比 DeepSeek-V3-0324 高出 5.0 分。其性能表现与 Claude3.7 和 GPT-4.5 相当，在多轮对话和基于约束的任务执行方面尤为突出。

items.en: Efficient Inference is paramount for the practical application of LLMs, particularly in interactive scenarios that demand rapid responses and cost-effective operation. To assess the serving efficiency of Hunyuan-TurboS in comparison to other leading reasoning models, we conducted inference cost evaluations across a diverse set of tasks. The 6k evaluation dataset comprised 30% STEM data and 70% general domain data. To ensure statistical robustness and mitigate measurement bias, each inference request was executed five times, and the average values were subsequently reported for analysis.
items.zh: 高效推理对于大语言模型的实际应用至关重要，特别是在需要快速响应和成本效益的交互场景中。为了评估 Hunyuan-TurboS 相对于其他领先推理模型的服务效率，我们在多种任务上进行了推理成本评估。6k 评估数据集包含 30% 的 STEM 数据和 70% 的通用领域数据。为确保统计稳健性并减少测量偏差，每个推理请求执行五次，并报告平均值用于分析。

items.en: As detailed in Table 5 and Table 3, the results demonstrate that Hunyuan-TurboS achieves the most cost-efficient output generation among all evaluated models. Notably, our model delivers performance comparable to that of Deepseek-R1 in the LMSYS Chatbot Arena while utilizing only 52.8% of the tokens, highlighting significant improvements in token efficiency which directly translate to reduced generation costs. Furthermore, Hunyuan-TurboS requires merely 40.5% of Qwen3-235B-A22B's generation cost. These findings demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed Adaptive Long-short Chain-of-Thought Fusion approach, also underscore Hunyuan-TurboS's strong capabilities in providing high-performance LLM inference with superior cost-effectiveness.
items.zh: 如表 5 和表 3 所示，结果表明 Hunyuan-TurboS 在所有评估模型中实现了最具成本效益的输出生成。值得注意的是，我们的模型在 LMSYS Chatbot Arena 中提供了与 Deepseek-R1 相当的性能，同时仅使用 52.8% 的 token，突显了 token 效率的显著提升，这直接转化为生成成本的降低。此外，Hunyuan-TurboS 的生成成本仅为 Qwen3-235B-A22B 的 40.5%。这些发现证明了我们提出的自适应长短思维链融合方法的有效性，也强调了 Hunyuan-TurboS 在提供高性能大语言模型推理方面具有卓越的成本效益。

items.capEn: Figure 4: A diagram illustrating the Context Parallelism of Hunyuan-TurboS infrastructures.
items.capZh: 图 4：说明 Hunyuan-TurboS 基础设施的上下文并行性的示意图。

items.en: Reinforcement Training Framework. The reinforcement training of Hunyuan-TurboS is based on Angel-RL, an efficient and lightweight reinforcement learning framework developed by Tencent that integrates both training and inference capabilities. Angel-RL is built upon Tencent's proprietary large-model training framework, AngelPTM (Nie et al., 2023), and the large-model inference framework, AngelHCF.
items.zh: 强化训练框架。Hunyuan-TurboS 的强化训练基于 Angel-RL，这是腾讯开发的一个高效轻量级强化学习框架，集成了训练和推理能力。Angel-RL 基于腾讯自研的大模型训练框架 AngelPTM（Nie 等人，2023）和大模型推理框架 AngelHCF。

items.en: To achieve highly efficient reinforcement training for Hunyuan-TurboS, we have implemented meticulous engineering optimizations.
